sys_metadata_link.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle"> <x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <city>Stockholm</city> <country>Sweden</country> <description>ultrices posuere cubilia curae mauris viverra diam vitae quam suspendisse potenti nullam porttitor lacus at turpis donec posuere</description> <end_date/> <make>Volvo</make> <model>EX60</model> <pin>9904</pin> <start_date>2026-02-01</start_date> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-02-17 04:50:50</sys_created_on> <sys_id>60b38326fd4b32107f44b9211467feaa</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 04:50:50</sys_updated_on> <vin>137FA90341E600811</vin> <year>2026</year> </x_snc_vehicle_ma_0_vehicle> </record_update>
